tool.name: Filter null elements

param.name: replacement
param.label: Replace null elements with this dataset
param.help: If provided, null elements will be replaced with this dataset

tool.help:
======== Synopsis ========
Removes null (missing) elements from a collection.
=========== Description ===========
This tool takes a dataset collection and filters out null elements. Null elements can appear when workflows use conditional steps -- if a step is skipped, it may produce a null placeholder instead of a real dataset.
Optionally, you can provide a replacement dataset. When a replacement is specified, null elements are replaced with that dataset instead of being removed.
-----
.. class:: infomark
@QUOTA_USAGE_NOTE@
